_schema.question: the question text shown to the LLM
_schema.demo_dropdown: if true, eligible for the HF Space dropdown

questions.question: What is the name of Alice's cat?
What was the Caterpillar smoking on top of the mushroom?
What does the Cheshire Cat famously leave behind when it vanishes?
Describe the Mad Tea-Party.
questions.answer: The March Hare and the Hatter are having tea at a table set out under a tree, with a sleeping Dormouse between them used as a cushion. The Hatter poses the riddle 'Why is a raven like a writing-desk?' and complains his watch is two days wrong because butter got into the works. It is always six o'clock — perpetual tea-time — because Time stopped working for the Hatter after the Queen of Hearts sentenced him for 'murdering the time' at her concert.
